response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows extensive experience in full-stack development with languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, D, and Node.js, but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform required for this role. His domain experience is also not aligned with capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, and there is no mention of SQL Server or Oracle, which are mandatory technical skills.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with diverse tech stack
Experience with low-latency applications and real-time data handling
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical communities
concerns: No experience with C++ development on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Lacks experience with SQL Server or Oracle (mandatory technical skills)
